---
title: "Proteomics Analysis Dashboard - PLASMA"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
    theme: flatly
runtime: shiny
---

Differential Abundance {data-icon="fa-volcano"}
=====================================
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(shiny)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(ggVennDiagram)

base_dir <- normalizePath(file.path(dirname(getwd()), "."), mustWork = TRUE)
results_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "b_results")
# ---- Load your results ----
# Each df should have columns: protein, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val, label
results_list <- list(
Baseline_CREvPLA = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_plasma.xlsx"), sheet = 1),
Training_CREvPLA = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_plasma.xlsx"), sheet = 2),
Training_CRE = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_plasma.xlsx"), sheet = 3),
Training_PLA = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_plasma.xlsx"), sheet = 4),
Interaction = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_plasma.xlsx"), sheet = 5),
Baseline_SURVvCTL = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_plasma.xlsx"), sheet = 6),
Training_SURVvCTL = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_plasma.xlsx"), sheet = 7),
Training_SURV = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_plasma.xlsx"), sheet = 8))

  
```

Sidebar {.sidebar}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r sidebar}
# --- Comparison selector ---
selectInput("comparison",
  label    = "Comparison",
  choices  = names(results_list),
  selected = names(results_list)[1]
)

hr()

# --- p-value type ---
radioButtons("pval_type",
  label    = "P-value type",
  choices  = c("Raw p-value" = "P.Value", "Adjusted p-value" = "adj.P.Val"),
  selected = "adj.pvalue"
)

# --- Thresholds ---
sliderInput("pval_thresh",
  label = "P-value threshold",
  min = 0.01, max = 0.1, value = 0.05, step = 0.01
)

sliderInput("logfc_thresh",
  label = "|logFC| threshold",
  min = 0, max = 1, value = 0.6, step = 0.1
)

hr()

# --- Optional: colour by significance ---
checkboxInput("colour_sig", "Colour by significance", value = TRUE)
```

Column {data-width=650}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Volcano Plot
```{r volcano}
plotlyOutput("volcano_plot")
```


Column {data-width=350}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Significant Proteins
```{r table}
DTOutput("sig_table")
```

### Summary
```{r summary}
verbatimTextOutput("summary_text")
```

```{r server, context="server"}

# ---- Reactive: filtered dataset ----
dat <- reactive({
  df <- results_list[[input$comparison]]
  df$pval_used <- df[[input$pval_type]]
  df$sig <- df$pval_used < input$pval_thresh & abs(df$logFC) > input$logfc_thresh
  df$direction <- ifelse(!df$sig, "ns",
                    ifelse(df$logFC > 0, "up", "down"))
  df
})

# ---- Volcano plot ----
output$volcano_plot <- renderPlotly({
  df <- dat()
  
  colour_map <- c("up" = "#e63946", "down" = "turquoise3", "ns" = "#adb5bd")
  
  p <- plot_ly(df,
    x = ~logFC,
    y = ~-log10(pval_used),
    type = "scatter", mode = "markers",
    color = if (input$colour_sig) ~direction else I("#adb5bd"),
    colors = colour_map,
    text = ~paste0("<b>", gene, "</b><br>",
                   description, "<br>",
                   "logFC: ", round(logFC, 3), "<br>",
                   "p: ", signif(pval_used, 3)),
    hoverinfo = "text",
    marker = list(size = 6, opacity = 0.75)
  ) %>%
    layout(
      title  = input$comparison,
      xaxis  = list(title = "log2 Fold Change",
                    zeroline = TRUE),
      yaxis  = list(title = paste0("-log10(", input$pval_type, ")")),
      shapes = list(
        # vertical logFC lines
        list(type="line", x0=input$logfc_thresh,  x1=input$logfc_thresh,
             y0=0, y1=1, yref="paper",
             line=list(dash="dot", color="grey")),
        list(type="line", x0=-input$logfc_thresh, x1=-input$logfc_thresh,
             y0=0, y1=1, yref="paper",
             line=list(dash="dot", color="grey")),
        # horizontal p-value line
        list(type="line", x0=0, x1=1, xref="paper",
             y0=-log10(input$pval_thresh), y1=-log10(input$pval_thresh),
             line=list(dash="dot", color="grey"))
      ),
      legend = list(title = list(text = "Direction"))
    )
  p
})

# ---- Significant proteins table ----
output$sig_table <- renderDT({
  dat() %>%
    filter(sig) %>%
    select(description, gene, logFC, pval_used, direction) %>%
    arrange(pval_used) %>%
    rename("Protein" = description, "Gene" = gene, "FC" = logFC,
           "p-value" = pval_used, "Direction" = direction) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~signif(.x, 3))) %>%
    datatable(options = list(pageLength = 10, dom = "tp"),
              rownames = FALSE)
}, server = FALSE)

# ---- Summary text ----
output$summary_text <- renderText({
  df  <- dat()
  up  <- sum(df$direction == "up",   na.rm = TRUE)
  dn  <- sum(df$direction == "down", na.rm = TRUE)
  tot <- nrow(df)
  paste0(
    "Comparison: ",    input$comparison, "\n",
    "Total proteins: ", tot, "\n",
    "Up-regulated: ",   up,  "\n",
    "Down-regulated: ", dn,  "\n",
    "logFC cutoff: ±",  input$logfc_thresh, "\n",
    input$pval_type, " < ", input$pval_thresh
  )
})

# ---- Venn Plot ----

```
